pressure_assessment.reason: Syntax repair only — cherry-pick damage in 40f2275c introduced 3 broken constructs across auth_middleware.py and authz.py. All three fixed.

repairs.issue: Cherry-pick deleted closing '}' from JSONResponse content=dict and closing ')' from return JSONResponse() call
repairs.fix: Added missing '}' and ')' after content dict

repairs.issue: Cherry-pick split require_auth docstring: line 149 opened new docstring, line 150 opened second orphan docstring with duplicate text — leaving first docstring unclosed
repairs.fix: Merged lines 149-150 into single docstring, removed orphan line 150

repairs.issue: Local import 'from app.gateway.auth_middleware import AuthMiddleware' inside create_app() shadowed global import at line 10. Python function-local scoping means AuthMiddleware was treated as local throughout create_app, causing UnboundLocalError at line 303 where global import was referenced
repairs.fix: Removed redundant local import — global import at line 10 already provides AuthMiddleware

smoke_test_result.stream_endpoint_csrf: PASS (403 CSRF, not 500 crash — CSRF middleware orthogonal to R133G scope)
